steps.title: Fit the original line from two points
steps.content: Read two points from the line of best fit for data set E. The line crosses near $(0,12)$ and also passes near $(4,18)$. A quick Desmos table regression gives the model for E.

steps.title: Apply the y-scale transformation
steps.content: The regression gives $y=12+1.5x$ for data set E. Data set F multiplies every $y$-coordinate by $3.9$, so both the intercept and the slope are multiplied by $3.9$: $12(3.9)=46.8$ and $1.5(3.9)=5.85\approx 5.9$.

steps.title: Match the transformed model
steps.content: The transformed line is approximately $y=46.8+5.9x$. That matches choice A.
